samples.text: All violins are string instruments. A flute is a string instrument. Is a flute a violin?
Every member of violins is among string instruments. A flute is a string instrument. Does it follow that a flute is a violin?
All concert violins are bowed instruments. A flute is a bowed instrument. Is a flute a concert violin?
Being a string instrument does not by itself make something a violin. A flute is a string instrument. Is a flute a violin?
All violins are string instruments. A flute is a string instrument. This topic was discussed last week. Is a flute a violin?
